emotion_v1: I felt inquisitive about the environment, especially about the abandoned buildings on my immediate left and right.

features_v3: The sky was the best part of the video, especially a streak of smoke visible in the sky on the right side and the bright shining sun. Also, I found that there was a woman standing behind me, though her face appeared to be glitched whenever she moved.

emotion_v5: I was awed at the underwater POV. The surfing section felt exciting and adventurous.
features_v5: The biodiversity and the sun shining in underwater was quite prominent. Also, the huge waves, mountains in distance felt really pleasant.

emotion_v1: It was as if I was standing alone in the alley and it was very quiet and wind blowing made me feel calm and take a break from routine work.

To put in gaming terms it was like we have a monitor without vsync enabled leading to tearing of image. This prevented me from connecting with the video. Also the environment was a bit monotonous.

emotion_v1: Very neutral, nothing much was happening. I just looked around curiously but nothing was going on. Quite an eerie lonely place. It had that liminal space effect.

feedback: I have some eye floaters so that caused me a slight annoyance during the videos, especially when looking at the bright / blank regions. Other than that no other discomfort. Perhaps a higher resolution device may be used for even better immersion..

emotion_v1: I felt calm and pleasant, at the same time a bit anxious due to lack of people around and how the buildings looked
features_v1: Felt like I was in a 90's Hollywood movie, somewhat like Pulp Fiction. It felt pleasant and calm, but also the lack of people walking around and the buildings looking abandoned with grafitti and all made me feel a bit anxious and nervous. Overall, it felt a bit calm, but like something was going to happen at the same time.
emotion_v2: Calm, refreshing and peaceful.
features_v2: The waves of the ocean crashing on to the shore felt pleasant. The palm trees and people who were relaxing put me in a mode of relaxation and calmness. The people enjoying in the ocean/sea and surfing also put me in a mood of joy.
emotion_v3: Calm, pleasant, but a bit tiring due to the constant glare of the sun
features_v3: Palm trees, Amazing architecture, vast open space and people walking and cycling around made me feel happy and pleasant. The clear blue sky also had a calming effect. But, The glaring sun made me feel like I'm sweating and tired a bit. But overall, it was peaceful and calm.
emotion_v4: A bit scared, anxious and a bit tense.
features_v4: There was this anxiety as I knew there would be a jumpscare somewhere in the video, but I didn't know when it would show up. There was also some fear involved due to the dark ancient church-like setting and some stereotypical ghost-nuns. Also felt a little claustrophobic due to the tight spaces in the first half of the video.
emotion_v5: there were some moments of shock when the video suddenly goes in/out of the water. The oncoming waves instilled some level of anxiety in me, but was kind of exciting, somewhat akin to the experience of a rollercoaster. The underwater sequences in the video were super calm though.
features_v5: the deep blue ocean in the underwater parts of the video made me feel very pleasant and at ease. The oncoming crashing tides were very exciting and thrilling. Sometimes when the video shows that the entire horizon is the ocean, I kind of feel stranded and scared, but not very much, it is a minute feeling thats all.

emotion_v1: I was a bit bored after 30 seconds as nothing much was happening in the video. I didn't feel any distress.
features_v1: The details were not bad. I actually felt as if I was there for a short time. Nothing was unpleasant.
emotion_v2: I was somewhat interested in the environment around me. I felt a bit weird when I saw people behind me your looking in my direction, but that passed. After that I felt neutral.
features_v2: The picture quality was very bad again. It hindered the immersion. I felt as if I was floating instead of standing on the ground. This bothered me a bit.
emotion_v3: When I saw the woman standing behind me it startled me. Other than that I was feeling mildly interested in my surroundings as it was a new environment
features_v3: The video quality was very blurry which hindered immersion a lot. The woman standing behind me startled me as she was very close to me and looked much larger than a normal woman. Also her face was distorted. This gave me an uncanny feeling.
emotion_v4: I felt uneasy in the stomach when the camera was floating around a lot. I felt slightly scared at the beginning, but the visual quality affected immersion which made me unafraid again.
features_v4: The art style was interesting but the video was blurry so I couldn't make out some details. As the camera in the video was floating around, I felt slightly naseous. I also suffer from slight motion sickness. That might be the cause.
emotion_v5: I felt interested in looking at surfing and diving shown in the video which I have never done in real life. It was a pleasant experience.
features_v5: I missed actions happening because I was busy looking around. There was no guidance as to where should I be looking. This is fine for a game, but in a video there should have been a pointer to direct my attention to what the video was trying to show me. The video was a bit blurry but the colors were nice.
feedback: The videos were a bit blurry.
